prompt: Change the galaxy shape to match the mask of image 2. Apply the rich, vibrant colors, glowing gaseous structures, and star field style from image 3 to the entire scene, enhancing the photorealistic detail and cosmic beauty.
prompt_refined: Edit the provided galaxy image (Image 1). Reshape the main galaxy in Image 1 to precisely conform to the elliptical ring contour of the white mask presented in Image 2. Infuse the entire cosmic scene of Image 1 with the rich, vibrant color palette, luminous gaseous structures, and sparkling star field style, including multi-colored stars with prominent diffraction spikes, characteristic of Image 3.
objects: Sparkling star field with multi-colored stars and prominent diffraction spikes
